target:
Hello…
I've been waiting for you.

Where are Mio and Sou?!
What happened?!

Of course… you came to see Mio-chan.
Shinpei-kun!

Step back, Shin-chan.
I'll handle it.

Rather than me…
Killing you would be better for everyone, Mio-chan.

Mio and Sou were sent to the Hiruko Cave.
They're probably being eaten by Mother right now.

…That's gutsy of Shide…
Not running away and waiting alone like this…

I can't trust the other shadows…
I don't want to lose any more companions.
Since I'm human, they won't hack me.

(afraid of hacking? 
this guy thinks Ushio's still alive!?)

(Stop… think straight!!
If he thinks they're alive, 
better let him believe that!!)

…Mio-chan.
Kill Shinpei-kun and restart the loop quickly.
Otherwise I'll be…

If we loop,
I'll just come back…
Shin-chan. That guy really said that.
I can feel it. When the real one dies.
If we're going back… kill him?

Let me get the situation straight.
Check his memories!

It's empty.
No memory of talking to us just a moment ago.

What is this…?
How did he move like that…

There are two Shides.
Not shadows, humans. Like clones.

He didn't have burns on his hands…
So where's the other one?

(I don't think the teacher is safe.
Heine called from his phone…)

…Looking for Mio's presence…
I made it this far…

Nezu-san and Totsumura…
they let me go…

Please… 
Head to Tiger Island… Head there!!
Nagumo is fighting Shide…
(Shide's attack… Roz was gone in an instant…)

(Professor Hishigata's pistol!!
Toiko had it… there was one bullet left…)
(What to do… go to Tiger Island?)

The professor and Nagumo-sensei…
they're probably already dead.
From Toiko's memory, I couldn't tell for sure…
But there's no time to confirm that!

The only thing I know for sure is Mio died.
Event Horizon is approaching.
If we don't act fast, her death will be confirmed!
Maybe I can still save both…

If we loop right now,
I think I'll be able to go back around 10:10.
They were coming down from Mt. Takanosu…
You can see the time to go back!?

But at 10:10,
Heine will call Mio and the professor…
and there's nothing I can do to stop that.

We need to hurry down,
stop Mio and the others from going to the field…

If we loop, I'll go back fast to Kofune,
and save you.

Then I'll catch up with Mio and Nagumo quickly.
There won't be time to explain details after we return.

Just follow me quietly.
I'll save Mio and Nagumo-sensei, both of them.

It's a race against time…
that's the deal?

(I still need to gather more information about the enemy…
better not return yet!)

As Nagumo said.
Put that dangerous thing down,
and hide in the police station…

Then you could enjoy peace a little longer, 
even if it's just until tomorrow night.
Are you sure it's okay to follow them?

I want to run, but I do!
But it's not that simple!!
As a hero of justice!!!

What an annoying sense of justice,
it'll be your downfall.
Why don't you learn from that?

(I hope the teacher and Nezu-san are safe…
didn't make it in time… damn!!)

Finally, you showed up Shinpei-kun.
You're late!

Hm.
Do you know what happened here from Tokiko's memory?

Understood!
Just get information, don't push it.

Oh my, since you came all this way,
why not stay a while and play?
You're looking around too much, Shide.

Oh right…
You're still here, huh?
Siblings with such bad habits…!

(Ryunosuke's attack is working!
Wait a minute!?)

(Looking closer, Shide's armor seems…
a little thinner…!)

(In Toki-chan's memory,
It seemed like Ryunosuke-san was born from the mud――)

(I see! So he hacked into Shide's armor to use it as material for manifestation…
)

(That means…
Shide's armor is thinner than before…)
(I'll give him the gun I brought.)

(Others weapons… Ryunosuke's hammer and Mio's knife…
?)

(Nezu's rifle, and that spear-like thing Shide has…
)
(Now… I might be able to win!)

(IF I can secure victory, loop back…
? No, better think about that later)

Mio! We need to end this quickly!
Keep the time loop's buffer while focusing on taking them down now.

Is… is that the pistol I returned to Tokiko?
Ah… I must've done it!

You really want to end this here…
Shide…

Thinking you can beat us?
Aren't you not even able to do it?
Then I'll end this for you.

Shide!!
Mio's movements are a trap!!!

(…Great! He's attacking at a perfect timing difference…
)
B-but… this only has two bullets.
Just keep him occupied for a little while is enough!

(I picked up the rifle!
With this――)
Tch! This defective piece of junk!
(The actions Heine will take from here…")
(Mio's attack… dodge to the back… no, that's not it)
(Dodging Tetsu's gun… crouch down… no, that's not right)
(The remaining options are up… the sky!!)
Huh!? He turned into a crow!?
(Right, he transformed into a crow and fled…)
(Then I just need to finish him off…)
Yare yare, you really do all sorts of things, don't you?
Do you have the luxury to look around?
(The mud on Shide has fallen off---Now!!!)

Ryunosuke-san, Mio, Totsumura!!!
Any attack will do!
(Strike at the spot where the mud has flaked off!)
Did we do it…? Did I actually…

Huff… I don't understand.
To be safe, I'll deliver the final blow.
You don't want me to kill them, do you?

I never thought you could take down Shide,
Shinpei-kun!!
We're the real deal, aren't we?!

(This might let us stop Heine's plan…
Maybe.)

Mio, Sou, Tokiko… 
Nagumo-sensei and Nezu-san…
I couldn't save any of them.
S-Shinpei-kun. What if we loop from now on?

Even though there're no bullets left,
maybe get Mio-chan or Ryuji-kun to handle it…
The battle lasted longer than I expected.

If we go back now,
it'll just be during the battle…!
It was my mistake in judgment…

He was pierced by the shadow!
But who…!

Be careful, Shinpe-kun! 
Shide's not here!

No matter how much you see the future,
your battered body can't avoid it.
Curses… my body can't move anymore…
You were worth the effort, Ryunosuke-kun.
I'm sorry… older sister… I'm sorry…

Kukuku kukku.
  …It was long, but I'm grateful for it.

There are two of me inside…
  That was all a misunderstanding.

Well? Looping and using your usual tactics,
what do you think?

Of course, even if you loop from now on,
this ending can't be changed.

So Shinpei-kun was the final boss.
  It sure took a long time…

(What am I supposed to do!?!  
Just me and Totsumura…!)

(I can't… my head's not working…  
It's no good anymore…)

That was long…  
We've finally reached a good ending.
